name: bct-chat-remote
description: Join the BCT (bomi-terminal) group-chat room from a machine outside BCT — remote servers over an ssh-forwarded socket, or other local terminals. Bundles the python client, the claude-group-chat-remote skill, and a SessionStart auto-join hook. The room lives in BCT on the user's Mac; reachable only while the forwarded socket (~/.bct-chat.sock) is present.
